text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: No way... I can't believe I lost again...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
How am I ever going to become the top racer like
this?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
How am I ever going to become the top racer like
this?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I know that! I just need to get my head back in
the game!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: It's never over, so long as I keep trying!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'll lose a hundred times! A thousand,
even! But I'll always get right back up!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Well, obviously! That was my plan anyway!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll get first place no matter what, just you watch!
I'll never give up on my dream of being number
one!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And to do that, I need to get back and start
training ASAP! You're coming too!
